title: Anwar E. Hadeed - Hadeed Legal
name: Anwar E. Hadeed
details:
📍 Coral Gables, FL

**Specialty:** Probate, guardianship, and estate planning for families

**Why:** Founded in 2024 as boutique firm, website has no mention of financial advisor partnerships or COI relationships, focuses solely on legal services

🔥 **HOT**

**Approach:** "New firm = open partnerships" strategy. Emphasize flat-rate pricing alignment with fee-based advisor model. Position as complementary Florida probate expertise for your northern clients relocating.

📞 hadeedlegal.com | (954) 738-9757 | anwar@hadeedlegal.com | 4000 Ponce de Leon Blvd, Suite 470, Coral Gables
approach: Anwar, I work with professionals and business owners in Brickell who are moving significant assets to Florida—many need trusted estate counsel who understands the probate differences here and I'd love to explore a referral relationship.

title: Yanitza Schoonover - The Schoonover Law Firm
name: Yanitza Schoonover
details:
📍 Miami, FL

**Specialty:** Probate administration, probate litigation, and estate planning across Miami-Dade/Broward/Palm Beach

**Why:** Solo practitioner website presents services only, no advisor partnerships mentioned, Rising Stars 2021-2026 suggests building practice

🌡️ **WARM**

**Approach:** Lead with probate litigation expertise—your clients with contested estates need both legal and financial guidance. Offer to co-host educational seminar on estate planning + wealth transfer.

📞 estateplanningattorney.us | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/yanitza-schoonover-esq-0a84b45
approach: Yanitza, I specialize in wealth management for families going through major transitions—divorces, inheritances, business sales—and I'm looking for an estate attorney who handles the complex litigation side to build a two-way referral relationship.

title: Monique Lavender Greenberg - Lavender Greenberg PLLC
name: Monique Lavender Greenberg
details:
📍 Coral Gables, FL

**Specialty:** Estate planning, probate, guardianship, asset protection—Board Certified in Wills, Trusts & Estates

**Why:** Firm website emphasizes collaboration with "financial planner, accountant, and coaches" but doesn't list a specific advisor partner locked in

🌡️ **WARM**

**Approach:** She already values advisor collaboration—position yourself as THE Brickell advisor she should partner with. Leverage her Board Certification credibility with your clients.

📞 lglawmiami.com | (786) 832-4694 | 2525 Ponce de Leon Blvd, Suite 300, Coral Gables
approach: Monique, I saw on your website that you collaborate with financial planners—I'm an Equitable advisor in Brickell working with $2-10M net worth clients who need Board Certified estate counsel, and I'd love to discuss becoming your go-to advisor partner.

title: Peter A. Dyson - The Estate Plan
name: Peter A. Dyson
details:
📍 Coral Gables, FL

**Specialty:** Estate planning, probate, trust administration, partition actions—boutique firm focused on "What If" planning

**Why:** Website mentions "collaborate with your personal and professional advisors" but doesn't name a locked-in partner, boutique model suggests selective partnerships

🌡️ **WARM**

**Approach:** Emphasize your Indian professional clientele (tech, consulting, medicine)—many need trust structures for international assets. Offer joint "new to Miami" estate planning workshop.

📞 theestateplanfl.com | (305) 677-8489 | 135 San Lorenzo Ave, #750, Coral Gables
approach: Peter, I work with a lot of senior directors and VPs relocating to Miami from the Northeast—they need estate planning that bridges their old state documents to Florida law, and I'd love to create a referral pipeline where I send you planning clients and you send me families who need wealth management after inheritance events.

title: Denise Jomarron - Denise Jomarron Legal Group
name: Denise Jomarron
details:
📍 Miami, FL

**Specialty:** Special needs planning, probate, guardianships, estate planning, Medicaid planning—serving families since 2009

**Why:** Website focuses on family-first legal services, no financial advisor partnerships mentioned, Rising Star recognition suggests growing practice

🌡️ **WARM**

**Approach:** Special needs trust clients MUST have coordinated advisor—huge opportunity. Offer to co-present at special needs parent support groups.

📞 djlegalgroup.com | Spanish-speaking services available
approach: Denise, I specialize in wealth management for families with special needs beneficiaries—the intersection of trusts, benefits, and investment planning is complex and I'm looking for an attorney who truly understands both the legal and emotional side to build a long-term partnership.

title: Alain E. Roman - The Law Office of Alain Roman, PLLC
name: Alain E. Roman
company: The Law Office of Alain Roman, PLLC
details:
📍 Doral, FL

**Specialty:** Estate planning, probate, guardianship for individuals and business owners

**Why:** Solo practitioner since 2015, website emphasizes accessibility and transparency, no advisor partnerships listed

🌡️ **WARM**

**Approach:** Doral = Venezuelan/Colombian/South American entrepreneurs. Position as the bilingual advisor who understands cross-border wealth.

📞 alainromanlaw.com | 8180 NW 36th Street, Suite 224, Doral
approach: Alain, I work with business owners and professionals in the Doral/Brickell corridor—many need integrated estate planning and wealth management, especially around business succession, and I'm looking for a trusted attorney who values long-term client relationships to partner with.

title: AJ Yolofsky - Yolofsky Law
name: AJ Yolofsky
details:
📍 Fort Lauderdale, FL

**Specialty:** Legacy planning and business succession for closely held businesses, veteran-owned firm

**Why:** Website positions as "advisors not just attorneys," focuses on business succession but no specific wealth management partner listed

🔥 **HOT**

**Approach:** Business succession clients NEED coordinated advisor for liquidity events. He's veteran (discipline/trust) and focuses on business owners—perfect fit. Lead with your business owner succession expertis

📞 yolofskylaw.com | (954) 237-4011 | 100 SE 3rd Ave, Suite 1000, Fort Lauderdale
approach: AJ, I'm a fellow service-minded professional—I work with business owners planning succession and exits in the $5-20M range, and they always need coordinated legal and financial strategy. Your veteran background and business succession focus tells me we'd work well together—let's grab coffee and discuss building a two-way referral pipeline.
